supported_devices: GrowDirector pH sensor, EC & water temp sensor, DO sensor, ORP sensor, air temp/humidity/VPD sensor, CO2 sensor, PAR sensor, LUX sensor, soil moisture sensor, flow meter
port_types: 4x sensor port (compatible with GrowDirector sensor range: temp/humidity/VPD, CO2, PAR, LUX, soil moisture, pH, EC/water temp, DO, ORP, flow meter), 24V DC power input
ai_notes: As the data collection hub, SensorDirector feeds sensor data to the platform ML engine for climate optimization, VPD management, and anomaly detection. Platform-wide AI Agronomist uses image recognition and NLP for plant health diagnosis (photo and voice input); weekly AI Climate Summary reports. AI features require cloud connectivity. Free tier available for AI Agronomist per manufacturer.
compatible_sensors: GrowDirector air temp/humidity/VPD sensor, GrowDirector CO2 sensor, GrowDirector PAR sensor, GrowDirector LUX sensor, GrowDirector soil moisture sensor, GrowDirector pH sensor, GrowDirector EC & water temp sensor, GrowDirector DO sensor, GrowDirector ORP sensor, GrowDirector flow meter
recommended_use_note: Commercial grow environment data collection hub. Pure sensing device — no switching outputs. Provides environmental data to the GrowDirector 3 PRO platform for automated control via other Director modules.
uvp_notes: Indicative price from AgriExpo marketplace, excl. tax. Official shop requires quote request. May not reflect current pricing.
notes: Part of GrowDirector 3 PRO modular ecosystem. Made in Israel. Pure sensor hub — has no relay, socket, or dimmer outputs. Sensors are optional accessories sold separately. Up to 64,000 sensors networkable in series across multiple units. Sensors must be GrowDirector branded (proprietary connector). VPD calculated from connected temp and humidity sensors. System maintains local automation when internet unavailable; full remote access requires internet. Not sold on Amazon.de. Note: GrowDirector 4 PRO (fully wireless platform) launched in 2025 — verify if current Director module range has been superseded.
